channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wien Hauptbahnhof ↔ Gramatneusiedl
item.description: Due to construction works, between Vienna Hbf (U) and Gramatneusiedl Station from 03.102026 to 04.10.2026 the train REX64(2679) from 03. to 04.102026 to 04. to 05.10.2026 the … [Since 08.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, between Vienna Hbf (U) and Gramatneusiedl Station from 03.102026 to 04.10.2026 the train REX64(2679) from 03. to 04.102026 to 04. to 05.10.2026 the …
[Since 08.07.2026]

item.title: Floridsdorfer Brücke from Am Rollerdamm to Friedrich-Engels-Platz
item.description: The driveway to the A22 towards the south is not possible during this period.The line 31 is short-run in the period from 06.07.2026 to 16.08.2026 and runs only … [06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The driveway to the A22 towards the south is not possible during this period.The line 31 is short-run in the period from 06.07.2026 to 16.08.2026 and runs only …
[06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]

item.title: 16A/N65/U6E: roadworks Am Schöpfwerk
item.description: Because of roadworks in the range Am Schöpfwerk and At the ice ponds the lines 16A, N65 and the rail replacement service U6E (spontaneously) are redirected. [03.08.2026 – 01.01.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks in the range Am Schöpfwerk and At the ice ponds the lines 16A, N65 and the rail replacement service U6E (spontaneously) are redirected.
[03.08.2026 – 01.01.2027]

item.title: 61B: Lemböckgasse
item.description: Stop change of line 61B towards Liesing S Stop: Lemböckgasse From: Ketzergasse 86-88 To: Ketzergasse 82 Duration: 13 July 2026, approximately 06.30 Clock duration … [07.07.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of line 61B towards Liesing S Stop: Lemböckgasse From: Ketzergasse 86-88 To: Ketzergasse 82 Duration: 13 July 2026, approximately 06.30 Clock duration …
[07.07.2026 – 31.07.2026]

item.title: Wien Hauptbahnhof ↔ Gramatneusiedl
item.description: Due to construction works there are no local trains between Vienna Hbf (U) and Gramatneusiedl station from 05.12 to 07.12.2026 (both from 23:15 o'clock - 04:40 o'clock). [Since 07.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works there are no local trains between Vienna Hbf (U) and Gramatneusiedl station from 05.12 to 07.12.2026 (both from 23:15 o'clock - 04:40 o'clock).
[Since 07.07.2026]

item.title: 10A/2/47A/59A/71/D/7A/9A/13A/14A/53A/54A/54B/63A:
item.description: Because of a cycling tour in the Ring and Schönbrunn there are traffic measures. [07.07.2026 – 12.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of a cycling tour in the Ring and Schönbrunn there are traffic measures.
[07.07.2026 – 12.07.2026]

item.title: 57A: construction works
item.description: Operation in the direction of Burgring only to Haus des Meeres. Buses run to Pilgramgasse. [07.07.2026 – 01.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Operation in the direction of Burgring only to Haus des Meeres. Buses run to Pilgramgasse.
[07.07.2026 – 01.09.2026]
